track: rr-9 - Barbra Streisand x Eduardo Saverin
notes: Manifesto. Contrast-heavy verses ('You study the signal — I am the signal'). The 'Barbra Streisand / Looping in my head / Same four bars / But they hit like a movie' is the hook. The escalation at end: 'I didn't read the manual / I am the manual / Let's fucking go.' Then 'Let's. Fucking. Go.' is three SEPARATE key chunks — each word its own moment. Then the fade 'Barbra Streisand... go... go... go...' closes it.

chunks.note: Barbra Streisand / Looping in my head — title hook #1
Same four bars / But they hit like a movie — hook landing #1
I don't have the context / But I still deploy — thesis pt1 #1
I don't know the method / But I still enjoy — thesis pt2 #1
Barbra Streisand / Looping in my head — hook #2
Same four bars / But they hit like a movie — hook landing #2
I don't have the context / But I still deploy — thesis #2
I don't match requirements / But I still enjoy — #2 variant
I didn't read the manual — setup #1
I am the manual — the reveal, signals converge
Let's fucking go. — detonation #1
(low echo: go... go... go...) — literal echo, italic treatment
Barbra Streisand / Looping in my head — final hook
I didn't read the manual — setup #final
I am the manual — the reveal, biggest
Let's fucking go. — detonation
Let's. — one word, one breath
Fucking. — one word, one breath
Go. — one word, the final period
(fade: Barbra Streisand... go... go... go...) — outro fade italic
